---
title: "Navigation of Thesis Notes"
bibliography: references.bib
---

::: {.hidden}
$$
\newcommand\mcy{{\mathcal{Y}}}
\newcommand{\R}{\mathbb{R}}
\newcommand{\E}{\mathbb{E}}
\def\*#1{\mathbf{#1}}
$$
:::

Done: 

- checked March 2026 page for thesis relevant notes
- checked April 2026 page
- Processed handwritten notes

To-do:

- Check latex notes
- check feb 2026, jan 2026, and dec 2025 posts

## Miscellaneous

:::{.hidden}
```{=html}
<object data= "pdfs/Chattj-Lead-TermYM-FE-Section-NotASection.pdf" type="application/pdf"
width="100%" height="100%" style="min-height:100vh;">
</object>
```
:::

:::{.hidden}
![Notes](pdfs/Chattj-Lead-TermYM-FE-Section-NotASection.pdf)
:::

```{=html}
<button type="button" class="btn btn-success" onclick="window.open('pdfs/Chattj-Lead-TermYM-FE-Section-NotASection.pdf', '_blank')">
  View Handwritten Notes PDF on Miscellaneous
</button>
```

- $U(N)$ is compact and eigenvalues have form $e^{i\theta}$. [Link](https://williamclarktennis.github.io/YM-explorations/March2026.html#march-16-2026)

## Section 1

```{=html}
<button type="button" class="btn btn-success" onclick="window.open('pdfs/Chattj-Lead-TermYM-FE-Section1.pdf', '_blank')">
  View Handwritten Notes PDF on Section 1
</button>
```

## Section 2

:::{.hidden}
```{=html}
<object data= "pdfs/Chattj-Lead-TermYM-FE-Section2.pdf" type="application/pdf"
width="100%" height="100%" style="min-height:100vh;">
</object>
```
:::

```{=html}
<button type="button" class="btn btn-success" onclick="window.open('pdfs/Chattj-Lead-TermYM-FE-Section2.pdf', '_blank')">
  View Handwritten Notes PDF on Section 2
</button>
```

## Section 3

:::{.hidden}
```{=html}
<object data= "pdfs/Chattj-Lead-TermYM-FE-Section3.pdf" type="application/pdf"
width="100%" height="100%" style="min-height:100vh;">
</object>
```
:::

```{=html}
<button type="button" class="btn btn-success" onclick="window.open('pdfs/Chattj-Lead-TermYM-FE-Section3.pdf', '_blank')">
  View Handwritten Notes PDF on Section 3
</button>
```

## Section 4

:::{.hidden}
```{=html}
<object data= "pdfs/Chattj-Lead-TermYM-FE-Section4.pdf" type="application/pdf"
width="100%" height="100%" style="min-height:100vh;">
</object>
```
:::

```{=html}
<button type="button" class="btn btn-success" onclick="window.open('pdfs/Chattj-Lead-TermYM-FE-Section4.pdf', '_blank')">
  View Handwritten Notes PDF on Section 4
</button>
```

## Section 6

:::{.hidden}
```{=html}
<object data= "pdfs/Chattj-Lead-TermYM-FE-Section6.pdf" type="application/pdf"
width="100%" height="100%" style="min-height:100vh;">
<p> It appears you don't have a PDF plugin for this browser. You can 
    <a href="pdfs/Chattj-Lead-TermYM-FE-Section6.pdf"> click here to download the PDF file. <\a></p>
</object>
```
:::

```{=html}
<button type="button" class="btn btn-success" onclick="window.open('pdfs/Chattj-Lead-TermYM-FE-Section6.pdf', '_blank')">
  View Handwritten Notes PDF on Section 6
</button>
```

## Section 7

:::{.hidden}
```{=html}
<object data= "pdfs/Chattj-Lead-TermYM-FE-Section7.pdf" type="application/pdf"
width="100%" height="100%" style="min-height:100vh;">
</object>
```
:::

```{=html}
<button type="button" class="btn btn-success" onclick="window.open('pdfs/Chattj-Lead-TermYM-FE-Section7.pdf', '_blank')">
  View Handwritten Notes PDF on Section 7
</button>
```

## Section 8

:::{.hidden}
```{=html}
<object data= "pdfs/Chattj-Lead-TermYM-FE-Section8.pdf" type="application/pdf"
width="100%" height="100%" style="min-height:100vh;">
</object>
```
:::

```{=html}
<button type="button" class="btn btn-success" onclick="window.open('pdfs/Chattj-Lead-TermYM-FE-Section8.pdf', '_blank')">
  View Handwritten Notes PDF on Section 8
</button>
```

## Section 9

:::{.hidden}
```{=html}
<object data= "pdfs/Chattj-Lead-TermYM-FE-Section9.pdf" type="application/pdf"
width="100%" height="100%" style="min-height:100vh;">
</object>
```
:::

```{=html}
<button type="button" class="btn btn-success" onclick="window.open('pdfs/Chattj-Lead-TermYM-FE-Section9.pdf', '_blank')">
  View Handwritten Notes PDF on Section 9
</button>
```

## Section 10

:::{.hidden}
```{=html}
<object data= "pdfs/Chattj-Lead-TermYM-FE-Section10.pdf" type="application/pdf"
width="100%" height="100%" style="min-height:100vh;">
</object>
```
:::

```{=html}
<button type="button" class="btn btn-success" onclick="window.open('pdfs/Chattj-Lead-TermYM-FE-Section10.pdf', '_blank')">
  View Handwritten Notes PDF on Section 10
</button>
```

- I typed out Lemma 10.2, but haven't gotten around to filling in the details yet in this link. [Link](https://williamclarktennis.github.io/YM-explorations/March2026.html#lemma-10.2-chatterjee)

## Section 11

:::{.hidden}
```{=html}
<object data= "pdfs/Chattj-Lead-TermYM-FE-Section11.pdf" type="application/pdf"
width="100%" height="100%" style="min-height:100vh;">
</object>
```
:::

```{=html}
<button type="button" class="btn btn-success" onclick="window.open('pdfs/Chattj-Lead-TermYM-FE-Section11.pdf', '_blank')">
  View Handwritten Notes PDF on Section 11
</button>
```

## Section 12

:::{.hidden}
```{=html}
<object data= "pdfs/Chattj-Lead-TermYM-FE-Section12.pdf" type="application/pdf"
width="100%" height="100%" style="min-height:100vh;">
</object>
```
:::

```{=html}
<button type="button" class="btn btn-success" onclick="window.open('pdfs/Chattj-Lead-TermYM-FE-Section12.pdf', '_blank')">
  View Handwritten Notes PDF on Section 12
</button>
```

- @FriedmanApplied was useful for this section, and I filled in some details
to a passage. [Link](https://williamclarktennis.github.io/YM-explorations/March2026.html#march-25-2026)
- Proof that $\E[X_j] = \mu_j$. [Link](https://williamclarktennis.github.io/YM-explorations/March2026.html#march-26-2026)
- Proof that $\text{Cov}(X_j,X_k) = \Sigma_{jk}$. [Link](https://williamclarktennis.github.io/YM-explorations/March2026.html#march-27-2026)
- Formulation of several lemmas on page 29. [Link](https://williamclarktennis.github.io/YM-explorations/March2026.html#more-on-section-12-chatterjee)
- Some details on the polynomial defining a Gaussian measure and linear algebra prerequisites. 
For example, showed that the density of a Gaussian measure can be expressed in a standard format. 
[Link](https://williamclarktennis.github.io/YM-explorations/March2026.html#march-24-2026)
- I discussed determinants for matrices indexed by unordered sets, which was a point of confusion 
when looking at $\det \Sigma$. [Link](https://williamclarktennis.github.io/YM-explorations/March2026.html#march-20-2026)
- Definition of polynomial $P: \R^{E_n} \to \R$. [Link](https://williamclarktennis.github.io/YM-explorations/March2026.html#polynomial)

## Section 13

:::{.hidden}
```{=html}
<object data= "pdfs/Chattj-Lead-TermYM-FE-Section13.pdf" type="application/pdf"
width="100%" height="100%" style="min-height:100vh;">
</object>
```
:::

```{=html}
<button type="button" class="btn btn-success" onclick="window.open('pdfs/Chattj-Lead-TermYM-FE-Section13.pdf', '_blank')">
  View Handwritten Notes PDF on Section 13
</button>
```

- Lemma 13.1 Proof. [Link](https://williamclarktennis.github.io/YM-explorations/March2026.html#following-chatterjee-lemma-13.1)
- Defining positive definite quadratic forms using @LangAlgebra. 
Proving that $M_n$ is symmetric and bilinear and quadratic, but not positive definite. [Link](https://williamclarktennis.github.io/YM-explorations/March2026.html#positive-definite-quadratic-form)

## Section 14

:::{.hidden}
```{=html}
<object data= "pdfs/Chattj-Lead-TermYM-FE-Section14.pdf" type="application/pdf"
width="100%" height="100%" style="min-height:100vh;">
</object>
```
:::

```{=html}
<button type="button" class="btn btn-success" onclick="window.open('pdfs/Chattj-Lead-TermYM-FE-Section14.pdf', '_blank')">
  View Handwritten Notes PDF on Section 14
</button>
```

## Section 15

:::{.hidden}
```{=html}
<object data= "pdfs/Chattj-Lead-TermYM-FE-Section15.pdf" type="application/pdf"
width="100%" height="100%" style="min-height:100vh;">
</object>
```
:::

```{=html}
<button type="button" class="btn btn-success" onclick="window.open('pdfs/Chattj-Lead-TermYM-FE-Section15.pdf', '_blank')">
  View Handwritten Notes PDF on Section 15
</button>
```


## Section 16

:::{.hidden}
```{=html}
<object data= "pdfs/Chattj-Lead-TermYM-FE-Section16.pdf" type="application/pdf"
width="100%" height="100%" style="min-height:100vh;">
</object>
```
:::

```{=html}
<button type="button" class="btn btn-success" onclick="window.open('pdfs/Chattj-Lead-TermYM-FE-Section16.pdf', '_blank')">
  View Handwritten Notes PDF on Section 16
</button>
```


## Section 17

:::{.hidden}
```{=html}
<object data= "pdfs/Chattj-Lead-TermYM-FE-Section17.pdf" type="application/pdf"
width="100%" height="100%" style="min-height:100vh;">
</object>
```
:::

```{=html}
<button type="button" class="btn btn-success" onclick="window.open('pdfs/Chattj-Lead-TermYM-FE-Section17.pdf', '_blank')">
  View Handwritten Notes PDF on Section 17
</button>
```


## Notes on Scaling Limit Paper

:::{.hidden}
```{=html}
<object data= "pdfs/Chattj-ScalingLimitSU(2)-notes.pdf" type="application/pdf"
width="100%" height="100%" style="min-height:100vh;">
</object>
```
:::

```{=html}
<button type="button" class="btn btn-success" onclick="window.open('pdfs/Chattj-ScalingLimitSU(2)-notes.pdf', '_blank')">
  View Handwritten Notes PDF on Scaling Limit Paper
</button>
```


- Guiding research question. [Link](https://williamclarktennis.github.io/YM-explorations/#april-9-2026)
- Annotated bibliography of articles related to SU(2). [Link](https://williamclarktennis.github.io/YM-explorations/#april-15-2026)
- scattered discussion of SU(2) and manifolds. [Link](https://williamclarktennis.github.io/YM-explorations/April2026.html#april-12-2026)
